summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 12 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Still holding at 46 overdue — the backlog isn't shrinking. This is above the 7-day average of 35 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 16 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 35 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $24,741 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 23 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 9 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 9. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 23 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $33,617 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

148 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **76 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 17 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$71,826 in payments going out this week** across 37 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,506 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 10. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 6 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 5 overdue (oldest: 23d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 2 upcoming unassigned. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 34 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 12 overdue (oldest: 35d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 8. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 10 overdue (oldest: 23d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 9 overdue — oldest first. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
